intent_yaml:
change_type: interface_config
site: store-1842
targets:
  device_ids:
  - v2-store1
  device_group: access-switches
policy:
  pci_reachable: false
  internet_reachable: true
metadata:
  requested_by: e2e
  ticket_id: null
  learning_mode: true
interface:
  name: Ethernet5
  description: E2E uplink
  enabled: true
  mode: access
  access_vlan: 40
  trunk_allowed_vlans: []
  ip_address: null

render.config:
interface Ethernet5
   description E2E uplink
   switchport mode access
   switchport access vlan 40
   no shutdown

checks.title: Intent Schema
checks.message: Intent loaded into the interface_config model.

checks.title: Target Resolution
checks.message: All requested target devices resolve in inventory.

checks.title: Interface Policy
checks.message: Interface intent stays within editable access/trunk/routed interface scope.

checks.title: Rendered Config Scope
checks.message: Rendered config only touches the intended interface_config feature scope.

checks.title: Deterministic Render
checks.message: Same intent renders to the same EOS config every time.
